publications.editedComment: BEHOLD, MINIONS: dream-card declares allowDelete, allowEdit, compact, dream, imageFit, selection state, and switches for actions, debug, description, image, metadata, and statistics. The dream-manager waits in the wings with dream-brainstorm, dream-interact, dream-maker, and Icon already named in the program. loadManagerData and refreshManagerData prepare the stage; normalizeTab and setTab place the scene; onDreamCreated, onDreamEditing, onDreamSaved, and onDreamSelected receive each cue. resolveSavedDreamId and setupUploadTarget handle their specific marks. OH OH—COUNT THEM: dream-brainstorm, dream-interact, dream-maker, and Icon, all in one manager!
